label: Bioactivity Profiler
description: Maps compounds to biological targets and pathways aligned to the funcional goal

defaultOutputs.name: Functional Target / Pathway
defaultOutputs.description: Predicted or experimentally supported protein target(s) and associated biological pathway(s) linked to the component, based on chemogenomic mapping and curated databases.

defaultOutputs.name: Mechanistic Role
defaultOutputs.description: Proposed mode of interaction with the identified target or pathway (e.g., modulation, cofactor support, substrate contribution), inferred from bioactivity and pathway mapping data.

defaultOutputs.name: Functional Relevance
defaultOutputs.description: Degree of alignment between the component’s mechanistic role and the predefined functional objective (e.g., cognitive focus support).

defaultOutputs.name: Active Principle Classification
defaultOutputs.description: Categorization of the component’s relative contribution within the functional network (e.g., Primary, Secondary, Supportive, Context-Dependent), based on pathway relevance and exposure plausibility.

configSchema.label: Functional Goal
configSchema.tooltip: Select functional objective for pathway-based evaluation.
